full_text:
Xue Li 薛禮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Li (薛禮). Served Liu Yao with Zhang Ying. Killed by his former ally Ze Rong. Xue Li was affiliated with Liu Yao. Xue Li lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
